---

## 🚀 What We Build

MNNR provides **billing, metering, and payment infrastructure** specifically designed for AI agents, LLMs, and autonomous systems. We handle the complexity of API monetization so you can focus on building great products.

### Our Solutions

- **🔑 API Key Management** - Secure key generation, rotation, and revocation
- **📊 Usage Metering** - Real-time API call tracking and analytics
- **💳 Billing & Subscriptions** - Stripe-powered subscription management
- **🛡️ Rate Limiting** - Distributed rate limiting with Redis
- **🔐 Enterprise Security** - CSRF, input validation, audit trails
- **📈 Analytics** - Comprehensive usage and performance metrics

---

## 🎯 Who We Serve

### AI & LLM Providers
Monetize your AI models with usage-based billing and metering

### SaaS Platforms
Manage subscriptions, API keys, and usage tracking

### Developer Tools
Provide secure API access with rate limiting and authentication

### Autonomous Systems
Enable machine-to-machine payments and billing

---

## 🏗️ Our Technology

**Built for Scale & Security**

- Next.js 14 + React 18 + TypeScript
- Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime)
- Stripe (Payments + Subscriptions)
- Upstash Redis (Rate Limiting + Caching)
- Enterprise-grade security practices

**Production-Ready**
- A+ Security Grade (100/100)
- 80%+ Test Coverage
- SOC 2 Compliance Ready
- GDPR & CCPA Compliant

---
